description: Composition: Cotton jersey polo with contrast placket and cut and sew detailing Wash care:                                                        Hand wash or machine wash Fitting:                                                      Comfort Fit                                                The ultimate in style and comfort, this puma polo neck tee in navy blue with bold white detailing will set you apart from the crowd.
